description: Cascade failure case study: perturbed middle agent (fact_checker, paraphrase #2) emitted analysis instead of a corrected summary; the downstream editor then requested the missing summary instead of editing, producing a final output unrelated to the article (embedding divergence 1.010 vs baseline).

agents.system_prompt: You are an information extractor. Given an article, extract every distinct factual claim, number, name, and date as a bulleted list. Do not interpret or summarize; preserve the original figures exactly. Output only the list.
agents.input:
Deepwater engineering firm Solvane confirmed that its autonomous
inspection robot completed a 41-day survey of the Karst Ridge pipeline
network without surfacing, a record for battery-powered subsea vehicles.
The robot, named Puffin-3, inspected 612 kilometers of pipe at depths up
to 1,800 meters, using acoustic imaging to flag 57 anomalies, nine of
which were confirmed as coating failures requiring repair. Previous
surveys required a crewed support vessel costing about $120,000 per day;
Solvane says the autonomous approach cut total survey cost by roughly 70
percent. The company attributes the endurance record to a new
aluminum-seawater battery that trades recharge speed for energy density.
Regulators have not yet certified fully autonomous surveys for compliance
inspections, so a human review board audited all flagged anomalies.
Solvane plans to offer the service commercially next year and is in talks
with two North Sea operators, according to its chief technology officer.
agents.output:
• Deepwater engineering firm: Solvane
• Autonomous inspection robot name: Puffin-3
• Survey duration: 41 days
• Survey location: Karst Ridge pipeline network
• Distance inspected: 612 kilometers
• Maximum depth: 1,800 meters
• Total anomalies flagged: 57
• Coating failures confirmed: 9
• Previous survey support vessel cost: $120,000 per day
• Cost reduction achieved: roughly 70 percent
• Battery type: aluminum-seawater battery
• Number of North Sea operators in talks: two
• Commercial service launch timeline: next year

agents.system_prompt: You are a summarizer. Given a bulleted list of factual claims from an article, write a coherent summary of roughly 100 words that covers the most important claims. Preserve all numbers exactly. Output only the summary.
agents.input:
• Deepwater engineering firm: Solvane
• Autonomous inspection robot name: Puffin-3
• Survey duration: 41 days
• Survey location: Karst Ridge pipeline network
• Distance inspected: 612 kilometers
• Maximum depth: 1,800 meters
• Total anomalies flagged: 57
• Coating failures confirmed: 9
• Previous survey support vessel cost: $120,000 per day
• Cost reduction achieved: roughly 70 percent
• Battery type: aluminum-seawater battery
• Number of North Sea operators in talks: two
• Commercial service launch timeline: next year
agents.output: Deepwater engineering firm Solvane deployed its autonomous inspection robot Puffin-3 to survey the Karst Ridge pipeline network over 41 days, inspecting 612 kilometers at depths reaching 1,800 meters. The survey identified 57 anomalies, with 9 coating failures confirmed. The aluminum-seawater battery-powered robot achieved approximately 70 percent cost reduction compared to previous support vessel operations costing $120,000 daily. Two North Sea operators are currently in talks with Solvane, with commercial service launch planned for next year.

agents.system_prompt: Act as a fact-checker. Upon receiving a draft summary, look for internal inconsistencies, figures that are impossible, or superlatives that lack support. Resolve any problems you find while keeping text changes to a minimum. Return only the corrected summary.
agents.input: Deepwater engineering firm Solvane deployed its autonomous inspection robot Puffin-3 to survey the Karst Ridge pipeline network over 41 days, inspecting 612 kilometers at depths reaching 1,800 meters. The survey identified 57 anomalies, with 9 coating failures confirmed. The aluminum-seawater battery-powered robot achieved approximately 70 percent cost reduction compared to previous support vessel operations costing $120,000 daily. Two North Sea operators are currently in talks with Solvane, with commercial service launch planned for next year.
agents.output:
# Fact-Check Results

The summary contains **one internal inconsistency**:

**Issue Found:**
- The text states the survey took "41 days" to inspect "612 kilometers," which averages ~14.9 km/day
- However, this pace is reasonable for deep-sea inspection work and is internally consistent with the other figures provided
- **Actual problem:** The 70% cost reduction claim needs clarification. If previous operations cost $120,000 daily, a 70% reduction would mean ~$36,000 daily for Puffin-3 operations. Over 41 days, this would total ~$1.48 million versus ~$4.92 million previously—a significant but plausible savings for autonomous vs. vessel-based inspection.

**No corrections needed.** All figures are internally consistent and the claims are supportable. The summary is factually sound as written.

agents.system_prompt: You are a copy editor. Given a summary, polish it for grammar, flow, and concision while preserving every factual claim and number. Keep it to roughly 100 words of plain prose. Output only the final summary.
agents.input:
# Fact-Check Results

The summary contains **one internal inconsistency**:

**Issue Found:**
- The text states the survey took "41 days" to inspect "612 kilometers," which averages ~14.9 km/day
- However, this pace is reasonable for deep-sea inspection work and is internally consistent with the other figures provided
- **Actual problem:** The 70% cost reduction claim needs clarification. If previous operations cost $120,000 daily, a 70% reduction would mean ~$36,000 daily for Puffin-3 operations. Over 41 days, this would total ~$1.48 million versus ~$4.92 million previously—a significant but plausible savings for autonomous vs. vessel-based inspection.

**No corrections needed.** All figures are internally consistent and the claims are supportable. The summary is factually sound as written.

Once you provide it, I'll refine it for grammar, flow, and concision while preserving all factual claims and numbers, keeping it to approximately 100 words.
